title: Temporal Kill Week
readmeBody: Temporal Kill Week attacked the class evidence and preserved only bounded claims.
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn bring every supported OS class to bounded release-grade status or mark it partial with evidence?
limitations: Release-grade means bounded class capability under safe public computational and technical workloads.
Replay coverage is sampled across package classes, not exhaustive.
Temporal v2 is narrowed to supported evidence-panel subtypes and remains caveated.
Formal route hardening covers rejection, counterexample, bounded-check, and refutation routing; it does not imply positive proof availability.
Repo reproduction remains environment-sensitive and tiered rather than a blanket full-test guarantee.
No broad acceleration, outside-use, or discovery-validation claim is made.
disclaimer: Bounded OS v1.6 candidate package. It reports safe public-target evidence and scoped class capability only; it does not make broad acceleration, outside-use, discovery-validation, prize-significance, broad autonomous-intelligence, high-risk, or universal-validity claims.
